info.name: 01 - Refund Immediate Success Or Failure+Retry(no stripe refundsId re_ case)
info.description: Synchronous refund, Stripe answers immediately. (A) Success Case-2 (deductFromDriver=true): raise -> approve -> asserts BAP (OwnerAsset->BuyerAsset) and BPP (OwnerExpense + SellerExpense) legs SETTLED, both Refund invoices and PDFs. (B) Failure then retry: force the Stripe create to error -> approve FAILED + legs VOIDED -> clear override -> retry -> REFUNDED.

exec: // Dynamic refund amounts derived from the real ride's charged amount T (captured by 00).
// rf1 = T/2 (primary), rf2 = T/4 (secondary/partial-2), rf3 = T/2 (04 over-cap: > remaining T/4).

function _poll(n){ pm.sendRequest({ url:_mockUrl()+'/mock/sql/select', method:'POST', header:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}, body:{ mode:'raw', raw:_sqlBody() } }, function(err,res){ var rows=[]; try{ rows=((res&&res.json())||{}).rows||[]; }catch(e){} if(rows.length){ _finish(rows); } else if(n>0){ setTimeout(function(){ _poll(n-1); }, 3000); } else { _finish([]); } }); }

item.name: [Failure] Raise 2nd Refund rf2 = T/4 (Customer)
[Failure] Mock override: refund create -> error (no re_)
[Failure] Capture 2nd refundRequestId (SQL — after drain)
[Failure] Approve -> FAILED (no re_)
[Failure] Clear mock override
[Failure] Retry approve -> REFUNDED (recovers)
[Failure] Assert the create-error attempt VOIDED its leg (SQL — after drain)

exec: function _ok(rows){ return rows.some(function(r){return r.status==='VOIDED';}) && rows.filter(function(r){return r.status==='SETTLED';}).length>=2; }
// create-error attempt: provisional leg VOIDED; rf1-success + rf2-retry both SETTLED.
try { var _rows = (_resp.rows) || []; console.log('  ↳ BAP ride ledger:', JSON.stringify(_rows.map(function(x){return {st:x.status, amt:x.amount};}))); } catch(e) {}
pm.test('BAP ledger: >=1 VOIDED (failed no-re_ attempt) and >=2 SETTLED (rf1 success + rf2 retry)', function () {
pm.expect(voided.length, 'expected >=1 VOIDED from the no-re_ failed refund').to.be.above(0);
